name: AI UMKM inventory stock formula baseline

steps.name: Final stock should match baseline inventory formula
steps.message: Formula: initial 100 + purchase 50 - sale 37 + return 2 - damaged 0 + adjustment 0 = 115

steps.name: Stock validation should reject negative stock result
steps.message: Negative stock scenario must be treated as failed business logic unless explicitly allowed.
